notes: Gamma B25: h2_hold_request=1 + h2_end_stream=0 + SSE envelope (200 OK, text/event-stream). Key change: hold enabled so outline generation request is intercepted BEFORE server responds. SSE with JSON object data (Build #26 proved JSON objects reach EventSource). No code changes — DB config only. Previous ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED (Builds #30-#33) was caused by server response interference with h2_hold_request=0. With hold=1, server never sees request, no race condition. Check: (1) Does EventSource receive SSE events? (2) Is warning text visible in UI? (3) Any cascade failures from hold?
